name: PulseNetwork
description: Pay-per-query access to 73 specialized intelligence verticals (800+ endpoints) over x402 (USDC on Base and Solana, no API keys, no subscription). Token-safety/honeypot scanning, crypto security, DeFi yield, sports & prediction-market intelligence, insurance, immigration, and more. Each call returns structured JSON for ~$0.015–$0.50.

skills.name: Solana memecoin safety scan
skills.description: Honeypot, rug, mint/freeze-authority, LP-lock and holder-concentration verdict (CLEAR/CAUTION/AVOID) for any SPL token by mint. x402 ~$0.015. GET https://onchainpulse.theaslangroupllc.com/api/memecoin?mint=

skills.name: EVM token safety scan
skills.description: Honeypot/rug/risk verdict for EVM tokens by contract on Base, Ethereum, BSC, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism, Avalanche. x402 ~$0.015. GET https://onchainpulse.theaslangroupllc.com/api/evmtoken?address=&chain=base

skills.name: Crypto security & DeFi yield
skills.description: Wallet-security/custody guidance and DeFi yield/APY across Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum and Solana (live DeFiLlama). x402 ~$0.10. GET https://cryptopulse-xi-five.vercel.app/api/{security,yield}

skills.name: Sports & prediction-market intelligence
skills.description: Calibrated sports, fantasy and prediction-market reads (NFL/NBA/MLB/golf/racing, Polymarket/Kalshi). x402 ~$0.50. GET https://signalpulse.theaslangroupllc.com/api/scan/{game,fantasy,predmarket}

skills.name: 73-vertical intelligence network
skills.description: Beyond crypto and sports: RWA/tokenized-asset intel, bank-health checks, nonprofit/foundation intel, citation analytics, stablecoin intelligence, insurance estimates, immigration/visa scoring, real-estate, legal, clinical, careers, travel and more — pay-per-query via x402. Full catalog with params and pricing at https://pulse.theaslangroupllc.com
